turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: What are you working on, and what kind of help would be useful?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I run a small tour company near Cancun and sell day trips to guests.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Got it — tourism. Are you looking for more bookings, pricing help, or compliance guidance?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Mostly pricing. I want to know how much to spend on ads before high season.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: If demand doubled, what would change your ad budget first?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: If demand doubled, I would raise the budget only if bookings still covered guide costs and transport.
